# llms.txt — Veterinaria Arimal
# Optimized for AI search engines (Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Copilot)
# https://arimal.com.mx

## About

Veterinaria Arimal is a premium veterinary clinic located in Plaza Hacienda Elite,
Av. Cumbres Elite 299-Local 106, Cumbres Elite, Sector Villas, 64349 Monterrey,
Nuevo León, Mexico. Phone: +52 81 2771 1270.

Google rating: 4.8 stars with 50+ verified reviews.
Hours: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM–7:00 PM.

## Services

- **Consulta General**: Comprehensive physical examination including eyes, ears, skin,
  and weight assessment. Duration: 20–30 minutes. Frequency: every 6–12 months.

- **Vacunación Preventiva** (Vaccination): Personalized immunization protocols based
  on age and lifestyle. Annual booster required. Duration: 15–20 minutes.

- **Desparasitación** (Deworming): Internal and external parasite control including
  fleas and ticks. Oral and topical options available. Frequency: every 3–6 months.

- **Cirugía y Esterilización** (Surgery): Preventive sterilization and soft tissue
  surgery with monitored inhalation anesthesia and post-op recovery assistance.
  Duration: 60–120 minutes.

- **Estética Veterinaria** (Grooming): Premium bath with specialized products,
  professional haircut, ear cleaning, nail trimming. Duration: 1.5–3 hours. Monthly.

- **Diagnóstico Avanzado** (Diagnostics): Laboratory studies, X-rays, and ultrasound
  with high-tech equipment and specialist interpretation.

## Location

Plaza Hacienda Elite, Av. Cumbres Elite 299-Loc. 106, Cumbres Elite, Sector Villas,
CP 64349, Monterrey, N.L., Mexico.

Coordinates: 25.7453411, -100.405461
